final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list misses the 2025-specific COGS presentation: 'Cost' and likely 'Change in finished goods and work in pogress' appear to replace the usual cost-of-sales line in 2025. Per rule, choosing outside candidates would require manual review, but keeping final choice minimal from candidates, using the clearest recurring COGS row.
